name: ucast-js-api-gotcha
description: CRITICAL: @ucast/js interpret() API is interpret(ast, item), NOT interpret(ast)(item). Using wrong pattern causes 'Unable to get field X out of undefined' error. Discovered during PoC when filtering returned empty results.
relevantCode:
result.filter(item => interpret(ast, item)) // CORRECT
result.filter(interpret(ast)) // WRONG - will fail
recommendation: Document in code comments. Add integration test that fails if pattern regresses.
